name: Yashili International Holdings Ltd
summary: Yashili International Holdings Ltd, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells dairy and nourishment products in the People's Republic of China and internationally. It operates through four segments: Milk Powder Products; Other Milk Powder Products; Dissolvable Products; and Other Operations. The company provides infant milk formula products under the Yashily, Dumex, Reeborne, Doraler, and Arla Baby & Me brand names. It also offers adult milk powder products under the Mengniu and Youyi brand names; milk formula for the middle-aged and elderly under the Yourui Liyi and Xinpei brand names; and children milk powder. In addition, the company provides various dissolvable products, such as soymilk powder, rice flour, and cereal products; and oatmeal under the Zhengwei brand name. Further, it is involved in the wholesale and retail of dairy products. The company was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong. Yashili International Holdings Ltd is a subsidiary of China Mengniu International Company Limited.
